div1.entryFree:
Progeny, 1) offspring: though the mourning brow of p. forbid the smiling courtesy of love the holy suit, LLL V, 2, 754 (i. e. a daughter who has lost her father). this same p. of evils comes from our debate, Mids. II, 1, 115.
2) descent: doubting thy birth and lawful p. H6A III, 3, 61.
3) race, ancestry: issued from the p. of kings, H6A V, 4, 38. the Hector that was the whip of your bragged p. Cor. I, 8, 12.
